name: universal-chat-provider
description: Expose CLIProxyAPI models in GitHub Copilot Chat.
author: Maximilian Dewald <maximilian@dewald.one>

commands.title: Universal Chat Provider: Restart Managed Server
Universal Chat Provider: Update Proxy Binary
Universal Chat Provider: Reset Managed Server
Universal Chat Provider: Import API Key from Config
Universal Chat Provider: Generate Commit Message
Universal Chat Provider: Select Commit Message Model
Universal Chat Provider: Clear Stored API Key
Universal Chat Provider: Show Server Output

enumDescriptions: Download and supervise a bundled CLIProxyAPI server automatically.
Connect to a CLIProxyAPI server you start yourself (uses Base URL and your own API key).
universalChatProvider.server.mode.description: How the CLIProxyAPI server is provided. 'managed' runs it for you; 'external' connects to your own instance.

universalChatProvider.server.version.description: CLIProxyAPI release to run in managed mode. Use a pinned version for reproducible installs, or 'latest' to track new releases.

universalChatProvider.server.suggestUpda.description: When a pinned managed server has a newer release within the same major version, offer to update to it. New major versions are never suggested automatically. No effect with 'latest' or in external mode.

universalChatProvider.baseUrl.description: Base URL of the CLIProxyAPI server. Used only in external mode; the managed server picks its own port.

universalChatProvider.configPath.description: Optional path to CLIProxyAPI config.yaml for credential and model metadata discovery.

universalChatProvider.autoDetectConfig.description: Search common local CLIProxyAPI config locations when no config path is set.

universalChatProvider.defaultMaxOutputTo.description: Fallback output-token limit when CLIProxyAPI provides no model-specific value.

universalChatProvider.commitMessage.mode.description: Model ID used only for commit-message generation. Use the Select Commit Message Model command to choose from currently available models.

universalChatProvider.commitMessage.inst.description: Optional commit-message instructions. When empty, a single-line Conventional Commits subject (no body) is generated; when set, these instructions replace that style and allow a longer message such as a body.

universalChatProvider.cacheMetrics.enabl.description: Record per-request prompt-cache metrics (cache-read vs cache-write vs uncached input tokens, with a hit rate) to a JSONL file in the extension's global storage, and show the running cache-hit rate in the status bar. Off by default; use it to diagnose why running sessions burn through rate limits.

scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build
